sentiment: Everything worth running finds its hardware eventually — given enough persistence and the right constraints.

stories.title: Incremental – A library for incremental computations
stories.summary: Jane Street's OCaml library for building reactive, incrementally-updating computation graphs — only recomputing what changed.

stories.title: Who's afraid of Chinese models?
stories.summary: Stratechery examines the geopolitical and competitive anxieties around rapidly advancing Chinese AI models.

stories.title: Running Doom on Our Custom CPU and Going Viral
stories.summary: A team built their own CPU from scratch and ported Doom to it — the universal benchmark for any piece of hardware.
